steps.eval: (()=>{const tree=document.querySelector('[data-testid=artifact-tree]'); const w=document.createTreeWalker(tree,NodeFilter.SHOW_TEXT); let n; while(n=w.nextNode()){ if((n.textContent||'').trim()==='design-chat-parity-gaps'){ let p=n.parentElement; while(p&&p!==tree){ if((p.className||'').includes('cursor-pointer')){p.click(); return true;} p=p.parentElement;}}} return false;})()

(()=>{const pm=document.querySelector('.ProseMirror'); if(!pm) return 'NO PM'; pm.focus(); const r=document.createRange(); r.selectNodeContents(pm); r.collapse(false); const s=window.getSelection(); s.removeAllRanges(); s.addRange(r); return 'focused:'+document.activeElement.className.slice(0,60);})()

(()=>{const pm=document.querySelector('.ProseMirror'); return {html: pm.innerHTML.slice(-2500), hasH1:!!pm.querySelector('h1:last-of-type'), hasH: Array.from(pm.querySelectorAll('h1,h2')).slice(-3).map(h=>h.innerText), hasList:!!pm.querySelector('ul,ol'), lastListTexts: Array.from(pm.querySelectorAll('ul li, ol li')).slice(-4).map(l=>l.innerText), hasCode:!!pm.querySelector('pre code, pre'), codeText: (pm.querySelector('pre')?.innerText||'').slice(0,100), hasLink:!!pm.querySelector('a'), links: Array.from(pm.querySelectorAll('a')).slice(-3).map(a=>({text:a.innerText, href:a.href}))};})()
